# (Interview) "Here's how  I’d  start my WordPress career today"

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-14 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 375

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today, I want to share with you an incredible WordPress success
story of Ben Rojas, the President of All in One SEO (AIOSEO).

Ben Rojas joined the Awesome Motive team in 2016 as a software
developer. In just 3 years, he rose to the role of the President
at AIOSEO - the original WordPress SEO plugin.

Ben Rojas Interview 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rlwdw2H-DD4jVZAop_rihW3g_BX8Sv11r51WWhOoHJY )

In an interview with James Agar from the WPBeginner team, Ben
explains how his background in WordPress development paved his
career growth.

Here’s the full interview:

👉 From a Support Role to Dev to the President: My WordPress Story

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rlwdw2H-DD4jVZAop_rihW3g_BX8Sv11r51WWhOoHJY )
 👈

Here's what you'll find in the interview:

- Ben reveals how he would start his WordPress career all over
again if he were to start today

- He recommends what to learn and focus on if you want to start a
WordPress career

- He also gives valuable advice to aspiring WordPress developers
and explains what the future of WordPress is

Read the full interview here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rlwdw2H-DD4jVZAop_rihW3g_BX8Sv11r51WWhOoHJY )
.

Do you know someone who aspires to become a WordPress developer?

Then don’t forget to forward this email to them :)

Also, let me know what your WordPress story is by replying to
this email.

I look forward to hearing from you :)

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
